response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite claiming C++ exposure from a 2014 LabWindows project; their work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or real-time traffic integration as required.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions in geospatial tools (GISCollective)
Proven ability to learn and deliver complex systems under tight constraints
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial data pipelines
Lacks demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or data consistency at scale
Primary tech stack (TypeScript/Node.js) does not align with core requirement of low-latency C++ systems
